changelog: Fixed: package.json and version.json now always in sync before every release
Fixed: Theme colour wheel picked the colour but the app stayed red — replaced every hardcoded #EC1F36 Tailwind class with semantic .accent-* utilities backed by live CSS custom properties on :root
Added: Five built-in theme presets in the colour picker — Default Crimson, Ocean Blue, Sunset Gold, Emerald, and Electric Violet
Added: Custom hex colour picker with live swatch — freeform colours supported, not just presets
Refactored: ColorPicker.tsx refactored to single clean write; stale duplicate tail removed
Fixed: Rest timer now fires exactly once — wasCompleted snapshot guards the incomplete→complete transition in toggleSetComplete()
Fixed: Muscle recovery granularity — Biceps, Triceps, Wrist, Forearm replace the broad Arms bucket; template and seed array updated; addWorkoutLog() migrates legacy Arms entries
Fixed: What's New panel shows only one Active version card (v2.0.4); v1.9 restored as a normal historical entry between v2.0.2 and v1.8
Fix: themeIdentity.ts exports (ThemePalette, THEMES, deriveCustomPalette, initThemeIdentity) all consumed without TS2554 errors
Fix: CapacitorUpdater version/exec guard — no more runtime crash on device
Fix: OTA polling loop removed; plugin runs once per app foreground
Fix: downloadProgressModal no longer stuck at 100%
Fix: Chart timestamp sort — metrics ordered oldest-to-newest reliably
Added: Chart period filter UI (day / week / month / 3 months)
Refactored: Dashboard widget cleanup and layout stabilisation
Fix: notifyAppReady fires once via useEffect dependency reset
Fix: version.json treated as single source of truth in OTA hook
